final_prompt.prompt:
Create a movie poster for "A Chinese Odyssey" reinterpreted in 90s Hong Kong cinema style.

Style/medium: needs a 90s Hong Kong cinema aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include the central embrace on the city wall as the focal point, with secondary figures positioned in the distance
Subject: must include Zhi Zunbao and Zixia in an embrace on the city wall, must include Bull Demon King and Tang Monk standing in the distance
Scene/backdrop: must include the ancient city wall setting with atmospheric depth for distant figures
Lighting/mood: needs a romantic yet melancholic atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a 90s Hong Kong cinema color direction — exact grading and saturation are yours
Materials/textures: must include film grain texture
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
